relationships: ber:Ma d tur-a, wwḍen mraw kraḍ n yisragen segmi ulac Internet
ber:Tom yules yesfaydi-d seg tlelli tawtilant deg sin n yigiman ed mraw kraḍ
ber:Ttwassaẓren deg sin yid-sen ɣer kraḍ n yimalasen n tkurmut
ber:Tom iɛawed yesfaydi-s seg tlelli tawtilant deg sin n yigiman ed mraw kraḍ
ber:Tom yesεa kraḍ n yimalasen aya seg wasmi i iguǧǧ
ber:Kraḍt n tmerwin ed kraḍ n yiseggasen aya seg wasmi ay temmut Marilyn Monroe
ber:Ttwassaẓrent deg snat yid-sent ɣer kraḍ n yimalasen n tkurmut
ber:Lemdeɣ tamaziɣt asmi i sɛiɣ mraw kraḍ n yiseggasen
ber:Lemdeɣ tamaziɣt asmi i liɣ mraw kraḍ n yiseggasen
ber:Lemdeɣ tamaziɣt ɣer mraw kraḍ n yiseggasen
ber:Dan yebda tissit asmi i yesεa mraw kraḍ n yiseggasen
ber:Yeqqim Tom yessawal qrib kraḍ n yisragen
ber:Yebɛed azal n twinest ed kraḍt n tmerwin ed kraḍ n yikilumitren ɣef London
ber:Tirni n Polisario tuleɣ-d deg wagim tẓat n tmaḍ samraw kraḍ
ber:Axxam n Tom yebɛed azal n kraḍ n yimilen seg-a
ber:Axxam n Tom yella yebɛed s kraḍ n yiḥedren ɣef teftist
